title: 3 Order Block Mistakes Killing Your Funded Account (2026)
description: Stop losing on order blocks. These 3 mistakes are why smart money keeps taking your stops — and how to fix them fast. ICT trading concepts broken down simply. Follow R2F Trading for daily setups and funded trader tips. 🔗 Link in bio.
script: Three words killing your funded account. And you're saying them every single trade. 'That's an order block.' Mistake one. You're marking every bearish candle as a block. Real order blocks have a displacement move AFTER them. No displacement? Not valid. Skip it. Mistake two. Trading order blocks with NO liquidity above. Smart money needs fuel to move price. If there's no resting liquidity, there's no reason for price to go there. 73% of failed setups? This exact reason. Mistake three. Ignoring the higher timeframe bias. A perfect four-hour order block means nothing if the daily says go short. Always trade WITH the draw on liquidity. Not against it. Fix all three and your win rate changes fast. Follow R2F Trading. New ICT setups dropped every single day.
